nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Grey grasswren
nodes.summary: Grey grasswren（Grey grasswren，学名 Amytornis barbatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括沼泽。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Hardy recorded significantly more captures in declared drought years than in normal years. thumb|right|Grey grasswren habitat During 2011, an extensive grey grasswren survey was conducted at Frome Swamp in New South Wales which had recently experienced substantial rainfall and resultant lignum and cane grass growth
